title: Bear 2L+1.8L 600W Electric Food Processors & Chopper with Glass Container and 304 Stainless Steel Container, 2 Speed Settings, 4 Stainless Steel Blades for Chopping Meat, Baby Food, Fruit, Vegetable
features: 👨🏻‍🍳[TWO SIZES] 2L+1.8L, double cups/double blades/double lids, sharp stainless steel blades with triple-layer structure to meet various needs in the kitchen.
💎[ 2L VISION GLASS BOWL] High-quality glass, safe to touch food. The operating status is visible at a glance.
🥩[1.8L STAINLESS STEEL CUP] The meat grinder container is made of food-grade 304 stainless steel, which is stronger and more durable than glass and plastic, and lasts longer.

💪[2-SPEED SETTING] Meat grinder power 600W for easy chopping, slicing, and mixing a variety of foods in a short time. Level 1 is for easy-to-chop foods like vegetables, fruits, garlic, chilies, onions, or cold soups. Level 2 is suitable for hard foods like meats, nuts, carrots, ham, or cheese.
🌈[EASY TO CLEAN] The meat grinder is designed to be detachable and easily cleaned by hand, the container and blades are dishwasher safe. ]
